items.title_en: U.S.-Iran war evolves into naval standoff over Strait of Hormuz after both countries seize ships
items.title_zh: 两国扣押船只后，美伊战争演变为霍尔木兹海峡海军对峙
items.desc_en: Brent oil has risen above $100 per barrel again as tanker traffic through the strait remains at a near standsill.
items.desc_zh: 由于穿过海峡的油轮运输仍处于近乎停滞状态，布伦特原油价格再次升至每桶 100 美元以上。

items.title_en: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉BBC，金的访问“绝对”有助于修复与英国的关系
items.desc_en: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.desc_zh: 在接受英国广播公司北美编辑的电话采访时，总统讨论了下周的访问以及他与英国首相的关系。

items.title_en: Microsoft plans first voluntary employee buyout in company's 51-year history
items.title_zh: 微软计划进行公司 51 年历史上的首次员工自愿买断
items.desc_en: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
items.desc_zh: 微软首次自愿买断将向高级主管级别及以下级别的员工开放，他们的工作年限和年龄合计达到 70 岁或以上。

items.title_en: South Africa's president suspends police chief after court charges
items.title_zh: 南非总统在法庭指控后暂停警察局长职务
items.desc_en: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.desc_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say

items.desc_en: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

items.title_en: Tesla shares fall after results. But this market speculation may keep the stock afloat for a while

items.desc_zh: 讨论的焦点是与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 旗下突破性火箭公司 SpaceX 的潜在合并，该公司将于今年晚些时候以接近 2 万亿美元的估值上市。

items.desc_en: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.
items.desc_zh: 为了增加研究和获取，医用大麻被归入较低类别的药物。

items.title_en: Trump administration moves to reclassify cannabis in major shift that could expand research
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府采取重大转变对大麻进行重新分类，这可能会扩大研究范围
items.desc_en: Trump administration to reclassify marijuana as Schedule III, easing research barriers but not legalizing the drug or changing current federal penalties.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府将大麻重新归类为附表三，放宽研究障碍，但不会使该药物合法化或改变现行的联邦处罚。

items.title_zh: 伊朗战争如何打击美国房屋建筑商

items.desc_zh: 许多建筑供应商报告称，从泡沫隔热材料、屋顶到门窗，四月份所有产品的价格都上涨了。

items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售

items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders to vote on Paramount deal
items.title_zh: 华纳兄弟探索公司股东将对派拉蒙交易进行投票
items.desc_en: Warner Bros. Discovery will hold a special meeting on Thursday for shareholders to vote on Paramount's proposed acquisition of the company.

items.title_en: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
items.title_zh: 在德黑兰，资金短缺，日常生活中战争的重演迫在眉睫
items.desc_en: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的 Lyse Doucet 从伊朗报道，那里繁忙的购物街掩盖了该国未来的巨大不确定性。

items.title_en: American Airlines cuts 2026 earnings projections after surge in jet fuel
items.title_zh: 航空燃油激增后美国航空下调 2026 年盈利预测
items.desc_en: American Airlines cut its 2026 earnings forecast, becoming the latest airline to lower its outlook after a surge in fuel costs added billions to its expenses.
items.desc_zh: 美国航空下调了 2026 年盈利预期，成为最新一家在燃油成本飙升导致支出增加数十亿美元后下调预期的航空公司。

items.title_en: Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms
items.title_zh: 2026 年大选临近，特朗普对经济缺乏关注令共和党人感到不安
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has been posting a lot on social media about his White House ballroom, the Iran war, and Pope Leo XIV. Not much about rising gas prices.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在社交媒体上发布了大量有关他的白宫舞厅、伊朗战争和教皇利奥十四世的信息。关于天然气价格上涨的情况不多。

items.title_en: Trump's net approval rating on economy and overall falls to lowest of his two terms, CNBC survey shows
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查显示，特朗普对经济和整体的净支持率降至两届任期中的最低水平
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's overall — and economic — approval ratings plunged in the latest CNBC All-America Economic Survey.
items.desc_zh: 在 CNBC 最新的全美经济调查中，唐纳德·特朗普总统的整体支持率和经济支持率大幅下降。

items.title_en: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
items.title_zh: 这些图表显示伊朗经济如何自由落体
items.desc_en: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的强硬言论掩盖了该政权和伊朗公民面临的残酷现实：其经济在战前就已经脆弱不堪，而现在却已支离破碎。
